Translator Notes: Record as in a row from a database.

English Text: To save time, not all records were retrieved. As a result, some functionality is reduced. Click to fetch all data (this may take some time).

Translator Notes: Handlebars is the name of a JavaScript library, not the part on a bicycle.
Cells wrap text to multiple lines
To "pin" is to force the group header to always be visible on screen.

English Text: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration, delete all perspectives, and start over?
Are you sure you want to delete this perspective?
The preferences system is not configured to permanently save perspectives.
Click to save the current configuration.  The next time this grid is visited, the previously saved configuration will automatically be used.
This pre-defined perspective cannot be saved with this name.  Click to save with a new name.  After that, any changes will be saved under the new name.

Translator Notes: Back as in to go backwards through history.
Forward as in to go forwards through history.

Pin column to left side of table?

Move to bottom of column list
Pinned columns always appear before any others in plain (non-grouped) output, in the relative order shown above.

Translator Notes: Field as in a property of a data object, not like a green grassy place with deer.

English Text: Show functions available for this field

Translator Notes: Used to display the header item for an aggregate function with the fields it is applied to, e.g. "Count Distinct of Country"

English Text: You can drag & drop this field into the grid controls above to filter, group or pivot.

Translator Notes: A header for slicing the data set according to repeating patterns, like "day of week" or "month of year."
